title: Cosmopolitan
description: A food mod that focuses on improving vanilla content and integrating food systems from various mods.
body:
![cosmo_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dad1f93b8bed44786f04339ba57b27b6e912776.jpeg) [![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ec02a0c24ff230847f55b7c68c7caf8a687a59_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/mfjZyHrWKp) **Cosmopolitan** is a mod that focuses on expanding food diversity and compatibility between vanilla and various mods. While you can play this mod on its own, its content will become much richer when paired with compatible mods. ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a944c21aa283e4c7250819e28d39b4b256b2a899.png) ![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62bdd5b6bc77c3cf5b7b9b44e7c3354a6f85e33c_0.webp) ![cosmo-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d188cc8950c7bf4e65c3884d44e737b5cdfee6.jpeg) - Wildberry, fiddlehead, wheatgrass, and birch sap. All of these new ingredients can be obtained from vanilla blocks. - New flavor effects design for Apple, Carrot, and Glow Berries. ![cosmo-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e8d149b0b9bef3ebd6869ebbf6f3fc31cf3bbda_0.webp) - New Items & Blocks: Ice Cream Cones, Ice Cream Sandwiches, and new Ice Cream Block variants - Fluid Support: Allows ice cream to be handled as a fluid and integrates with Create recipes - Frozen Dessert Tub: A brand new block for storing ice cream and crafting it in a more immersive way ![cosmo-3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d34938c2b4605cd6110b43994000cd793db7e9.jpeg) - New dishes built around the newly added ingredients. - Four new seasonal drinks. When Serene Seasons is installed, consuming them in the matching season will provide beneficial status effects. ![cosmo-4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3cba49b542d2995aa5b206ca30b97a9165f1171_0.webp) - New flavor effects design for Blisterberry and Droopfruit from Undergarden. These effects will provide additional benefits while players are in the Undergarden dimension. - Improves more berries from various mods in a Berry Good style. - Some random minor features: renewable slime candy, advanced milk alternatives, and more...
Support Mod List - **[JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)** - **[Serene Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons)** - **[Tough As Nails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tough-as-nails)** - **[Neapolitan](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/neapolitan)** - **[Exquisito](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/exquisito)** - **[Seasonals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seasonals)** - **[Peculiars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peculiars)** - **[Respiteful](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/respiteful)** - **[Environmental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental)** - **[Atmospheric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/atmospheric)** - **[Caverns And Chasms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/caverns-and-chasms)** - **[Berry Good](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berry-good)** - **[Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)** - **[Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)** - **[Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau)** - **[Habitat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/habitat)** - **[The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)** - **[The Undergarden](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-undergarden)** - **[Farmers Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)** - **[Brewin And Chewin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewin-and-chewin)** - **[Delightful](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/delightful)** - **[Collectors Reap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collectors-reap)** - **[Casualness Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/casualness-delight)** - **[Frycooks Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frycooks-delight)** - **[Farmers Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite)** - **[Miners Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/miners-delight-plus)** - **[Seed Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seed-delight)** - **[Sunflower Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sunflower-delight)** - **[Twilights Flavors Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilights-flavors-delight)** - **[Vanilla Cookbook](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanilla-cookbook)** - **[Kitchen Karrot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kitchen-karrot)**
As this is still an early version, it's strongly recommended to back up your world before installing.
